<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/validator_operator/validator_delegations.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-validator-operator-validator-delegations-bash-215" location="lines:215-234" -->
```bash
   curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   --data-raw '{
     "commands": [
       {
         "CreateCommand": {
           "templateId": "#splice-wallet:Splice.Wallet.MintingDelegation:MintingDelegationProposal",
           "createArguments": {
             "delegation": {
               "beneficiary": "'"$BENEFICIARY_PARTY"'",
               "delegate": "'"$DELEGATE_PARTY"'",
               "dso": "'"$DSO_PARTY"'",
               "expiresAt": "'"$EXPIRES_AT"'",
               "amuletMergeLimit": '"$AMULET_MERGE_LIMIT"'
             }
           }
         }
       }
     ]
   }' \
   "$LEDGER_API_URL/v2/commands"
```
